compiled_state.title: [red-test-writer]: worktree isolation files written to session dir instead of worktree -> worktree auto-cleaned with no changes
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
When dso:red-test-writer agents are dispatched with isolation:worktree, they write files to the session directory path (ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT) instead of their worktree root. This causes the worktree to be auto-cleaned (no changes detected) while the files appear as untracked in the session directory.

## Reproduction
1. Dispatch dso:red-test-writer with isolation:worktree
2. Agent reports TEST_RESULT:written
3. Task notification has no <worktree> section — worktree auto-cleaned
4. Files found as untracked in session directory

## Expected Behavior
Agent should write files within its worktree root. Worktree should retain changes.

## Workaround
Re-dispatch without worktree isolation (shared-directory mode).
